top_signals.title: Marvell Soars After Nvidia Chief’s $1 Trillion Stock Call
top_signals.summary: Marvell Technology Inc. shares surged in early trading Tuesday after Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang predicted the semiconductor and networking company will be the next business to hit a $1 trillion valuation, more than five times its current capitalization.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MSC Confirms Container Ship Hit by Projectiles in Iraqi Port
top_signals.summary: MSC Mediterranean Shipping Company (MSC) has confirmed that its container vessel MSC Sariska V was struck by two projectiles while departing the port of Umm Qasr in Iraq on June 1, though no crew members were injured.According to the company…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Euro’s Global Role Gains a Bit But Still Distant From Dollar
top_signals.summary: International use of the euro rose slightly in 2025 but stayed well below that of the dollar, highlighting the difficulty of mounting a global challenge to the greenback’s supremacy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Victoria Secret shares spike 40% after big earnings beat, raised sales outlook
top_signals.summary: Victoria's Secret has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Hillary Super, who said the company is winning over young shoppers across all incomes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
